zh.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Scott是Robert Scott Of Rankilburn和Lady Telfer的兒子，於大約1394年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利。他於大約1420年與Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1469年2月9日在蘇格蘭洛包爾布藍霍爾姆享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Scott是Robert Scott Of Rankilburn和Lady Telfer的儿子，于大约1394年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利。他于大约1420年与Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1469年2月9日在苏格兰洛包爾布藍霍爾姆享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Scott was born about 1394, in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland as the son of Robert Scott Of Rankilburn and Lady Telfer. He married Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland about 1420, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 9 February 1469, in Branxholm, Roxburghshire, Scotland, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Scott est né environ 1394, à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, fils de Robert Scott Of Rankilburn et Lady Telfer. Il a épousé Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland environ 1420, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé le 9 février 1469, à Branxholm, Roxburghshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Scott wurde um 1394 in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, als Sohn von Robert Scott Of Rankilburn und Lady Telfer geboren. Er hat um 1420 in Scotland Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb am 9. Februar 1469 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Branxholm, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Scott è nato il circa 1394 nel Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland come figlio di Robert Scott Of Rankilburn e Lady Telfer. Lui sposato Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland circa 1420, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 9 febbraio 1469, nel Branxholm, Roxburghshire, Scotland, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Scottは約1394年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーでRobert Scott Of RankilburnとLady Telferの息子として生まれた。約1420年にスコットランドでMargaret Cockburn, Of Henderlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1469年2月9日にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアブランクスhオルムで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Scott(은)는 대략 1394년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 Robert Scott Of Rankilburn(와)과 Lady Telfer의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1420년 스컷랜드에서 Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1469년 2월 9일 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 브랜스홀름에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Scott nasceu aproximadamente 1394, em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland filho de Robert Scott Of Rankilburn e Lady Telfer. Ele casou-se com Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland aproximadamente 1420, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1469, em Branxholm, Roxburghshire, Scotland, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Scott родился около 1394 г. в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. Его родителей звали Robert Scott Of Rankilburn и Lady Telfer. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland около 1420 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер 9 февраля 1469 г. в местности бранксхолм, роксбургшир, Шотландия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Scott nació aproximadamente 1394, en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland como hijo de Robert Scott Of Rankilburn y Lady Telfer. Se casó con Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland aproximadamente 1420, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió el 9 de febrero de 1469, en Branxholm, Roxburghshire, Scotland, a la edad de 76 años.
